coverage_note: The bundled KRAS population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from KRAS RAS GTPase switching, MAPK pathway activation, PI3K crosstalk, proliferation, differentiation, and oncogenic signaling and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000133703: KRAS coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: KRAS findings should be read against RAS GTPase switching, MAPK pathway activation, PI3K crosstalk, proliferation, differentiation, and oncogenic signaling; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.

KRAS codon 12/13/61 model is curated as a KRAS marker for Somatic oncology and targeted-therapy context, RAS-MAPK pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.

rs61764370 (KRAS 3'UTR marker) is curated as a KRAS marker for Somatic oncology and targeted-therapy context, RAS-MAPK pathway biology; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
